TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Suy-wen-di ťöčśĖáŚłĚ == nikaudipan balakiÁĒüŚĻ≥Á∂ďś≠∑ pilecuhanŚáļÁĒü Yen-cin itida i Si-wi-ta-tun pitu mihcaan enem a bulad sabaw tulu dimiad labi pilecuhan i Pung-yi-pan-zuo-ni-se', pangangan han nu wunsan ci " Na-luo-yen", u "sakapahay nu udipan sa". ci ama ni Yen-cin u Si-wi Suy-kuo-kun, Pei-cuo-cu'-kuo, Ta-se-kun-da-yen-cun, wina cu Lise. acawa u hunhuo nu Pei-cuo nu waluay a kanatalan nu masacacayay nu naiay a malekakaay nu wawaan ci Cia-luo, u "lumeniay a hungan". ,śĄŹÁāļ"ťĽĎś≤ąť¶ô"). sakakaay nida a tataynaan a wawa siacawa tu Pei-cuo-sun-ti u hun-huo, sakahemekan ku udip nu kawaw nida. ci Yen-cin itida i henay naw satabakiay nu tahudan, singanganaca tu Ta-sin-cun-kun, midayday tu kawaw nu wama, Pei-cuo wu-ti' sakakaay a tahudan, namilabu milepacaw tu Pei-ci nu nikalepacawan. masakapah henay ci Yen-cin namikilul ci Wu-tiam milawpes tu Pei-ci palecad tu Hua-pei, caay ka tenes tu lingatu nu mihcaan " limpicwal mihcaan" imelang mabelec mapatay, Pei-cuo ci Sin-ti' ku malatahudan.kina mikuwanay. Pei-cu sin-ti' caay kaw kanamuhan a tademaw, mipatay tu sakakaay, maalaw ku kanatal sipabeli tu tunkun a malumanay ci Cen-yi, mabiyalaw namin ku tademaw. tu Ta-cen lingatu nu mihcaan " limpicsiw mihcaan" tusa a bulad caysiw demiad, ci Yi-wen-pin sakamusa a sipabeli nu maku tu pituay a mihcaan nu sakakaay aku a wawaanci Yi-wen-canan, sumad hank u mihcaan nu bangguan u tabakiay a Zo, u tin-yen hunti. . tabakiay Zo tusa a mihcaan "limwalsep mihcaan" tulu a bulad lucay dimiad, ci Yi-wen-can pasingagan han ci Yen-un u Luo-cu sakakaay, tukiw sakakaay, tayda i malumanay a kitidaan misalama, nu ayawan a tusa nu bulad tusa a bataan dimiad, kawili kawanan nu sakakaaym, sumad han ci Yen-cin ku sakakaay nu tahdan. misumad tu hitayŤĽćśĒŅśĒĻťĚ© cen-ce' a nipacukel tada silaheci tu. mahida ci Cen-yi, Su-wi, Kaw-yin tu pinaay nu tahudan nipicuduh nu heni. ci Yen-cin yadah ku sapisawacuay a kawawan, milalid tu sakaudip, sisa pasikineng han ci Su-wi tu cudad, misumad tu misawacuay a hulican, patideng tu kanatal a hulican, kiya manuneng ku binacadan, mawada ku sakaybakinan, u papatayan a tademaw u melecen, atu litabatan tusa kina hulic, u saka lihalay nu tademawan. itini i sakay cen-li a kawawan, nu nipikuwan ni Yen-cin, caay kapah ku kawaw nida tu sakay kanatalan, misanai' tu tademaw, kaisa tu maanupay nu tademawan a wayway. ci Yen-cin patuduan nida ci Liu-sen milakalak tu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa a niyadu'an, sakamaanupay nu tahudan makaala tu tusa a lasubuan ku tademaw mahemik ku kitidaan. kapah satu ku nipikuwan, macunustu ku sakay kanatalan nu kalisaiw, sa idaw ku sapiedap tu pakuyucay, ka limulakan ci Suy-kaw-cu, u matatungusay kina kawaw sa. sakaudip ni kakenihan tu tulul amis makaala tu tusa a lasubu pitu a bataan nu tenes, mangelu' ku sakaudip, nai' ku micumuday tu kalisiwan nu kanatal, u cun-yun a niyadu'an ku sasiidaay. tu siwa a mihcaan nu Kan-hun "limwalsiw mihcaan", u hitay nu Suy-cun hamin a kapah ku kanatal, u sakaicelang nu kanatalan ku muntiti. mitengil ci Yen-cin tu kamu ni Se-ma-su-wi, alesen ku cikah, pah sapacumud tu damsu i siciw, nikudan kinapina miwada' tu damsu, miwada' tu nitamudungan nu tademaw tu sapatahekal nu damsuan, sapaayaw tu kanatal sakay umahan a nikasilaculan, kya malahat ku sakaudip. . balakitu misiki tu sapipenecawśôöŚĻīŚāĺŤĽč pikuwanan ni Suy-wen-ti pacebasa mipatay tu tahudan, mangalay misakaku, hamaw sa ku tahuda miliyas ci nidaan. tada micidek tu ku atekak, micidek ku sakay pibakinan, matalaw namin ku binacadan. paka "kapahay nu nikalingatuan" pakainai'en ku laheci. sakamusa, kabalihenawan ku nikasikawawan, nu mimangdayay a tademaw hamin han mipatay, u nipibakin alaw ba'ke't tu nai' t uku natademawan, caay tu kahida nu kalingatuan nu hulican. . epingeng nida ku pinaay a tatamaan a wawaan, pululen nida ku sakatulu nu tatamaan a wawa ci Yen-cun, sakasepat a wawa ci Yen-siw palahida han u hucu nu tademaw. ci Wen-di nai' ku tanektekay a aenengan, palawpesen nida ku babalaki patideng tu wawa, ci Yen-kun palawpesan nida ci Yen-yung, sa patideng tu Tan-caw a Tan-kaw-cu Li-yen malecad a patelac, sisa ci Suy-tan-se-ce saan u Suy-ca nika hinian ku nikademec. . Wen-di balakitu ku nikaudaip hina palawpes, manamuh tu kanamuhan, sademiad sa midang, ina la'cusay a waywayan mapalalid ci tayce Yeng-kun, yu mikuwan henay ci Wen-ti mamin mapalawpes ku nicuwkingan, mamin mapalawpes ni Yeng-kun. .
S.PHON: == suj-w…ôn-di *** == nikaudipan bar~…ĺaki**** pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan** j…ôn- ¶in itida i si-wi-ta-tun pitu mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad sabaw tur~…ĺu dimiad r~…ĺabi pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i puŇč-ji-pan-zuo-ni-s…ô Ē~ °, paŇčaŇčan ńßan nu wunsan ¶i " na-r~…ĺuo-j…ôn", u "sakapańßaj nu udipan sa". ¶i ama ni j…ôn- ¶in u si-wi suj-kuo-kun, p…ôi- ¶uo- ¶u Ē~ °-kuo, ta-s…ô-kun-da-j…ôn- ¶un, wina ¶u r~…ĺis…ô. a ¶awa u ńßunńßuo nu p…ôi- ¶uo nu war~…ĺuaj a kanatar~…ĺan nu masa ¶a ¶ajaj nu naiaj a mar~…ĺ…ôkakaaj nu wawaan ¶i ¶ia-r~…ĺuo, u "r~…ĺum…ôniaj a ńßuŇčan". ,**"***"). sakakaaj nida a tatajnaan a wawa sia ¶awa tu p…ôi- ¶uo-sun-ti u ńßun-ńßuo, sakańß…ôm…ôkan ku udip nu kawaw nida. ¶i j…ôn- ¶in itida i ńß…ônaj naw satabakiaj nu tańßudan, siŇčaŇčana ¶a tu ta-sin- ¶un-kun, midajdaj tu kawaw nu wama, p…ôi- ¶uo wu-ti Ē~ ° sakakaaj a tańßudan, namir~…ĺabu mir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw tu p…ôi- ¶i nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. masakapańß ńß…ônaj ¶i j…ôn- ¶in namikir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i wu-tiam mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu p…ôi- ¶i par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ńßua-p…ôi, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs tu r~…ĺiŇčatu nu mińß ¶aan " r~…ĺimpi ¶war~…ĺ mińß ¶aan" im…ôr~…ĺaŇč mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ mapataj, p…ôi- ¶uo ¶i sin-ti Ē~ ° ku mar~…ĺatańßudan.kina mikuwanaj. p…ôi- ¶u sin-ti Ē~ ° ¶aaj kaw kanamuńßan a tad…ômaw, mipataj tu sakakaaj, maar~…ĺaw ku kanatar~…ĺ sipab…ôr~…ĺi tu tunkun a mar~…ĺumanaj ¶i ¶…ôn-ji, mabijar~…ĺaw namin ku tad…ômaw. tu ta- ¶…ôn r~…ĺiŇčatu nu mińß ¶aan " r~…ĺimpi ¶siw mińß ¶aan" tusa a bur~…ĺad ¶ajsiw d…ômiad, ¶i ji-w…ôn-pin sakamusa a sipab…ôr~…ĺi nu maku tu pituaj a mińß ¶aan nu sakakaaj aku a wawaan ¶i ji-w…ôn- ¶anan, sumad ńßank u mińß ¶aan nu baŇčguan u tabakiaj a zo, u tin-j…ôn ńßunti. . tabakiaj zo tusa a mińß ¶aan "r~…ĺimwar~…ĺs…ôp mińß ¶aan" tur~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad r~…ĺu ¶aj dimiad, ¶i ji-w…ôn- ¶an pasiŇčagan ńßan ¶i j…ôn-un u r~…ĺuo- ¶u sakakaaj, tukiw sakakaaj, tajda i mar~…ĺumanaj a kitidaan misar~…ĺama, nu ajawan a tusa nu bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan dimiad, kawir~…ĺi kawanan nu sakakaajm, sumad ńßan ¶i j…ôn- ¶in ku sakakaaj nu tańßdan. misumad tu ńßitaj**** ¶…ôn- ¶…ô Ē~ ° a nipa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tada sir~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu. mańßida ¶i ¶…ôn-ji, su-wi, kaw-jin tu pinaaj nu tańßudan nipi ¶uduńß nu ńß…ôni. ¶i j…ôn- ¶in jadańß ku sapisawa ¶uaj a kawawan, mir~…ĺar~…ĺid tu sakaudip, sisa pasikin…ôŇč ńßan ¶i su-wi tu ¶udad, misumad tu misawa ¶uaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶an, patid…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺ a ńßur~…ĺi ¶an, kija manun…ôŇč ku bina ¶adan, mawada ku sakajbakinan, u papatajan a tad…ômaw u m…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôn, atu r~…ĺitabatan tusa kina ńßur~…ĺi ¶, u saka r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu tad…ômawan. itini i sakaj ¶…ôn-r~…ĺi a kawawan, nu nipikuwan ni j…ôn- ¶in, ¶aaj kapańß ku kawaw nida tu sakaj kanatar~…ĺan, misanai Ē~ ° tu tad…ômaw, kaisa tu maanupaj nu tad…ômawan a wajwaj. ¶i j…ôn- ¶in patuduan nida ¶i r~…ĺiu-s…ôn mir~…ĺakar~…ĺak tu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku tusa a nijadu Ē~ °an, sakamaanupaj nu tańßudan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a r~…ĺasubuan ku tad…ômaw mańß…ômik ku kitidaan. kapańß satu ku nipikuwan, ma ¶unustu ku sakaj kanatar~…ĺan nu kar~…ĺisaiw, sa idaw ku sapi…ôdap tu pakuju ¶aj, ka r~…ĺimur~…ĺakan ¶i suj-kaw- ¶u, u matatuŇčusaj kina kawaw sa. sakaudip ni kak…ônińßan tu tur~…ĺur~…ĺ amis makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu pitu a bataan nu t…ôn…ôs, maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku sakaudip, nai Ē~ ° ku mi ¶umudaj tu kar~…ĺisiwan nu kanatar~…ĺ, u ¶un-jun a nijadu Ē~ °an ku sasiidaaj. tu siwa a mińß ¶aan nu kan-ńßun "r~…ĺimwar~…ĺsiw mińß ¶aan", u ńßitaj nu suj- ¶un ńßamin a kapańß ku kanatar~…ĺ, u sakai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺan ku muntiti. mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ ¶i j…ôn- ¶in tu kamu ni s…ô-ma-su-wi, ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn ku ¶ikańß, pańß sapa ¶umud tu damsu i si ¶iw, nikudan kinapina miwada Ē~ ° tu damsu, miwada Ē~ ° tu nitamuduŇčan nu tad…ômaw tu sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu damsuan, sapaajaw tu kanatar~…ĺ sakaj umańßan a nikasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, kja mar~…ĺańßat ku sakaudip. . bar~…ĺakitu misiki tu sapip…ôn…ô ¶aw**** pikuwanan ni suj-w…ôn-ti pa ¶…ôbasa mipataj tu tańßudan, maŇčar~…ĺaj misakaku, ńßamaw sa ku tańßuda mir~…ĺijas ¶i nidaan. tada mi ¶id…ôk tu ku at…ôkak, mi ¶id…ôk ku sakaj pibakinan, matar~…ĺaw namin ku bina ¶adan. paka "kapańßaj nu nikar~…ĺiŇčatuan" pakainai Ē~ °…ôn ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. sakamusa, kabar~…ĺińß…ônawan ku nikasikawawan, nu mimaŇčdajaj a tad…ômaw ńßamin ńßan mipataj, u nipibakin ar~…ĺaw ba Ē~ °k…ô Ē~ °t tu nai Ē~ ° t uku natad…ômawan, ¶aaj tu kańßida nu kar~…ĺiŇčatuan nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶an. . …ôpiŇč…ôŇč nida ku pinaaj a tatamaan a wawaan, pur~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn nida ku sakatur~…ĺu nu tatamaan a wawa ¶i j…ôn- ¶un, sakas…ôpat a wawa ¶i j…ôn-siw par~…ĺańßida ńßan u ńßu ¶u nu tad…ômaw. ¶i w…ôn-di nai Ē~ ° ku tan…ôkt…ôkaj a a…ôn…ôŇčan, par~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn nida ku babar~…ĺaki patid…ôŇč tu wawa, ¶i j…ôn-kun par~…ĺawp…ôsan nida ¶i j…ôn-juŇč, sa patid…ôŇč tu tan- ¶aw a tan-kaw- ¶u r~…ĺi-j…ôn mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶, sisa ¶i suj-tan-s…ô- ¶…ô saan u suj- ¶a nika ńßinian ku nikad…ôm…ô ¶. . w…ôn-di bar~…ĺakitu ku nikaudaip ńßina par~…ĺawp…ôs, manamuńß tu kanamuńßan, sad…ômiad sa midaŇč, ina r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a wajwajan mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid ¶i taj ¶…ô j…ôŇč-kun, ju mikuwan ńß…ônaj ¶i w…ôn-ti mamin mapar~…ĺawp…ôs ku ni ¶uwkiŇčan, mamin mapar~…ĺawp…ôs ni j…ôŇč-kun. .
S.FORM: == Suy-wen-di ťöčśĖáŚłĚ == nikaudipan balakiÁĒüŚĻ≥Á∂ďś≠∑ pilecuhanŚáļÁĒü Yen-cin itida i Si-wi-ta-tun pitu mihcaan enem a bulad sabaw tulu dimiad labi pilecuhan i Pung-yi-pan-zuo-ni-se', pangangan han nu wunsan ci " Na-luo-yen", u "sakapahay nu udipan sa". ci ama ni Yen-cin u Si-wi Suy-kuo-kun, Pei-cuo-cu'-kuo, Ta-se-kun-da-yen-cun, wina cu Lise. acawa u hunhuo nu Pei-cuo nu waluay a kanatalan nu masacacayay nu naiay a malekakaay nu wawaan ci Cia-luo, u "lumeniay a hungan". ,śĄŹÁāļ"ťĽĎś≤ąť¶ô"). sakakaay nida a tataynaan a wawa siacawa tu Pei-cuo-sun-ti u hun-huo, sakahemekan ku udip nu kawaw nida. ci Yen-cin itida i henay naw satabakiay nu tahudan, singanganaca tu Ta-sin-cun-kun, midayday tu kawaw nu wama, Pei-cuo wu-ti' sakakaay a tahudan, namilabu milepacaw tu Pei-ci nu nikalepacawan. masakapah henay ci Yen-cin namikilul ci Wu-tiam milawpes tu Pei-ci palecad tu Hua-pei, caay ka tenes tu lingatu nu mihcaan " limpicwal mihcaan" imelang mabelec mapatay, Pei-cuo ci Sin-ti' ku malatahudan.kina mikuwanay. Pei-cu sin-ti' caay kaw kanamuhan a tademaw, mipatay tu sakakaay, maalaw ku kanatal sipabeli tu tunkun a malumanay ci Cen-yi, mabiyalaw namin ku tademaw. tu Ta-cen lingatu nu mihcaan " limpicsiw mihcaan" tusa a bulad caysiw demiad, ci Yi-wen-pin sakamusa a sipabeli nu maku tu pituay a mihcaan nu sakakaay aku a wawaanci Yi-wen-canan, sumad hank u mihcaan nu bangguan u tabakiay a Zo, u tin-yen hunti. . tabakiay Zo tusa a mihcaan "limwalsep mihcaan" tulu a bulad lucay dimiad, ci Yi-wen-can pasingagan han ci Yen-un u Luo-cu sakakaay, tukiw sakakaay, tayda i malumanay a kitidaan misalama, nu ayawan a tusa nu bulad tusa a bataan dimiad, kawili kawanan nu sakakaaym, sumad han ci Yen-cin ku sakakaay nu tahdan. misumad tu hitayŤĽćśĒŅśĒĻťĚ© cen-ce' a nipacukel tada silaheci tu. mahida ci Cen-yi, Su-wi, Kaw-yin tu pinaay nu tahudan nipicuduh nu heni. ci Yen-cin yadah ku sapisawacuay a kawawan, milalid tu sakaudip, sisa pasikineng han ci Su-wi tu cudad, misumad tu misawacuay a hulican, patideng tu kanatal a hulican, kiya manuneng ku binacadan, mawada ku sakaybakinan, u papatayan a tademaw u melecen, atu litabatan tusa kina hulic, u saka lihalay nu tademawan. itini i sakay cen-li a kawawan, nu nipikuwan ni Yen-cin, caay kapah ku kawaw nida tu sakay kanatalan, misanai' tu tademaw, kaisa tu maanupay nu tademawan a wayway. ci Yen-cin patuduan nida ci Liu-sen milakalak tu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa a niyadu'an, sakamaanupay nu tahudan makaala tu tusa a lasubuan ku tademaw mahemik ku kitidaan. kapah satu ku nipikuwan, macunustu ku sakay kanatalan nu kalisaiw, sa idaw ku sapiedap tu pakuyucay, ka limulakan ci Suy-kaw-cu, u matatungusay kina kawaw sa. sakaudip ni kakenihan tu tulul amis makaala tu tusa a lasubu pitu a bataan nu tenes, mangelu' ku sakaudip, nai' ku micumuday tu kalisiwan nu kanatal, u cun-yun a niyadu'an ku sasiidaay. tu siwa a mihcaan nu Kan-hun "limwalsiw mihcaan", u hitay nu Suy-cun hamin a kapah ku kanatal, u sakaicelang nu kanatalan ku muntiti. mitengil ci Yen-cin tu kamu ni Se-ma-su-wi, alesen ku cikah, pah sapacumud tu damsu i siciw, nikudan kinapina miwada' tu damsu, miwada' tu nitamudungan nu tademaw tu sapatahekal nu damsuan, sapaayaw tu kanatal sakay umahan a nikasilaculan, kya malahat ku sakaudip. . balakitu misiki tu sapipenecawśôöŚĻīŚāĺŤĽč pikuwanan ni Suy-wen-ti pacebasa mipatay tu tahudan, mangalay misakaku, hamaw sa ku tahuda miliyas ci nidaan. tada micidek tu ku atekak, micidek ku sakay pibakinan, matalaw namin ku binacadan. paka "kapahay nu nikalingatuan" pakainai'en ku laheci. sakamusa, kabalihenawan ku nikasikawawan, nu mimangdayay a tademaw hamin han mipatay, u nipibakin alaw ba'ke't tu nai' t uku natademawan, caay tu kahida nu kalingatuan nu hulican. . epingeng nida ku pinaay a tatamaan a wawaan, pululen nida ku sakatulu nu tatamaan a wawa ci Yen-cun, sakasepat a wawa ci Yen-siw palahida han u hucu nu tademaw. ci Wen-di nai' ku tanektekay a aenengan, palawpesen nida ku babalaki patideng tu wawa, ci Yen-kun palawpesan nida ci Yen-yung, sa patideng tu Tan-caw a Tan-kaw-cu Li-yen malecad a patelac, sisa ci Suy-tan-se-ce saan u Suy-ca nika hinian ku nikademec. . Wen-di balakitu ku nikaudaip hina palawpes, manamuh tu kanamuhan, sademiad sa midang, ina la'cusay a waywayan mapalalid ci tayce Yeng-kun, yu mikuwan henay ci Wen-ti mamin mapalawpes ku nicuwkingan, mamin mapalawpes ni Yeng-kun. .

¶u r~…ĺis…ô. a ¶awa u ńßunńßuo nu p…ôi- ¶uo nu war~…ĺuaj a kanatar~…ĺan nu masa ¶a ¶ajaj nu naiaj a mar~…ĺ…ôkakaaj nu wawaan ¶i ¶ia-r~…ĺuo, u "r~…ĺum…ôniaj a ńßuŇčan". ,**"***"). sakakaaj nida a tatajnaan a wawa sia ¶awa tu p…ôi- ¶uo-sun-ti u ńßun-ńßuo, sakańß…ôm…ôkan ku udip nu kawaw nida. ¶i j…ôn- ¶in itida i ńß…ônaj naw satabakiaj nu tańßudan, siŇčaŇčana ¶a tu ta-sin- ¶un-kun, midajdaj tu kawaw nu wama, p…ôi- ¶uo wu-ti Ē~ ° sakakaaj a tańßudan, namir~…ĺabu mir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw tu p…ôi- ¶i nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. masakapańß ńß…ônaj ¶i j…ôn- ¶in namikir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i wu-tiam mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu p…ôi- ¶i par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ńßua-p…ôi, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs tu r~…ĺiŇčatu nu mińß ¶aan " r~…ĺimpi ¶war~…ĺ mińß ¶aan" im…ôr~…ĺaŇč mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ mapataj, p…ôi- ¶uo ¶i sin-ti Ē~ ° ku mar~…ĺatańßudan.kina mikuwanaj. p…ôi- ¶u sin-ti Ē~ ° ¶aaj kaw kanamuńßan a tad…ômaw, mipataj tu sakakaaj, maar~…ĺaw ku kanatar~…ĺ sipab…ôr~…ĺi tu tunkun a mar~…ĺumanaj ¶i ¶…ôn-ji, mabijar~…ĺaw namin ku tad…ômaw. tu ta- ¶…ôn r~…ĺiŇčatu nu mińß ¶aan " r~…ĺimpi ¶siw mińß ¶aan" tusa a bur~…ĺad ¶ajsiw d…ômiad, ¶i ji-w…ôn-pin sakamusa a sipab…ôr~…ĺi nu maku tu pituaj a mińß ¶aan nu sakakaaj aku a wawaan ¶i ji-w…ôn- ¶anan, sumad ńßank u mińß ¶aan nu baŇčguan u tabakiaj a zo, u tin-j…ôn ńßunti. . tabakiaj zo tusa a mińß ¶aan "r~…ĺimwar~…ĺs…ôp mińß ¶aan" tur~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad r~…ĺu ¶aj dimiad, ¶i ji-w…ôn- ¶an pasiŇčagan ńßan ¶i j…ôn-un u r~…ĺuo- ¶u sakakaaj, tukiw sakakaaj, tajda i mar~…ĺumanaj a kitidaan misar~…ĺama, nu ajawan a tusa nu bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan dimiad, kawir~…ĺi kawanan nu sakakaajm, sumad ńßan ¶i j…ôn- ¶in ku sakakaaj nu tańßdan. misumad tu ńßitaj**** ¶…ôn- ¶…ô Ē~ ° a nipa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tada sir~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu. mańßida ¶i ¶…ôn-ji, su-wi, kaw-jin tu pinaaj nu tańßudan nipi ¶uduńß nu ńß…ôni. ¶i j…ôn- ¶in jadańß ku sapisawa ¶uaj a kawawan, mir~…ĺar~…ĺid tu sakaudip, sisa pasikin…ôŇč ńßan ¶i su-wi tu ¶udad, misumad tu misawa ¶uaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶an, patid…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺ a ńßur~…ĺi ¶an, kija manun…ôŇč ku bina ¶adan, mawada ku sakajbakinan, u papatajan a tad…ômaw u m…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôn, atu r~…ĺitabatan tusa kina ńßur~…ĺi ¶, u saka r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu tad…ômawan. itini i sakaj ¶…ôn-r~…ĺi a kawawan, nu nipikuwan ni j…ôn- ¶in, ¶aaj kapańß ku kawaw nida tu sakaj kanatar~…ĺan, misanai Ē~ ° tu tad…ômaw, kaisa tu maanupaj nu tad…ômawan a wajwaj. ¶i j…ôn- ¶in patuduan nida ¶i r~…ĺiu-s…ôn mir~…ĺakar~…ĺak tu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku tusa a nijadu Ē~ °an, sakamaanupaj nu tańßudan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a r~…ĺasubuan ku tad…ômaw mańß…ômik ku kitidaan. kapańß satu ku nipikuwan, ma ¶unustu ku sakaj kanatar~…ĺan nu kar~…ĺisaiw, sa idaw ku sapi…ôdap tu pakuju ¶aj, ka r~…ĺimur~…ĺakan ¶i suj-kaw- ¶u, u matatuŇčusaj kina kawaw sa. sakaudip ni kak…ônińßan tu tur~…ĺur~…ĺ amis makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu pitu a bataan nu t…ôn…ôs, maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku sakaudip, nai Ē~ ° ku mi ¶umudaj tu kar~…ĺisiwan nu kanatar~…ĺ, u ¶un-jun a nijadu Ē~ °an ku sasiidaaj. tu siwa a mińß ¶aan nu kan-ńßun "r~…ĺimwar~…ĺsiw mińß ¶aan", u ńßitaj nu suj- ¶un ńßamin a kapańß ku kanatar~…ĺ, u sakai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺan ku muntiti. mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ ¶i j…ôn- ¶in tu kamu ni s…ô-ma-su-wi, ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn ku ¶ikańß, pańß sapa ¶umud tu damsu i si ¶iw, nikudan kinapina miwada Ē~ ° tu damsu, miwada Ē~ ° tu nitamuduŇčan nu tad…ômaw tu sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu damsuan, sapaajaw tu kanatar~…ĺ sakaj umańßan a nikasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, kja mar~…ĺańßat ku sakaudip. . bar~…ĺakitu misiki tu sapip…ôn…ô ¶aw**** pikuwanan ni suj-w…ôn-ti pa ¶…ôbasa mipataj tu tańßudan, maŇčar~…ĺaj misakaku, ńßamaw sa ku tańßuda mir~…ĺijas ¶i nidaan. tada mi ¶id…ôk tu ku at…ôkak, mi ¶id…ôk ku sakaj pibakinan, matar~…ĺaw namin ku bina ¶adan. paka "kapańßaj nu nikar~…ĺiŇčatuan" pakainai Ē~ °…ôn ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. sakamusa, kabar~…ĺińß…ônawan ku nikasikawawan, nu mimaŇčdajaj a tad…ômaw ńßamin ńßan mipataj, u nipibakin ar~…ĺaw ba Ē~ °k…ô Ē~ °t tu nai Ē~ ° t uku natad…ômawan, ¶aaj tu kańßida nu kar~…ĺiŇčatuan nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶an. . …ôpiŇč…ôŇč nida ku pinaaj a tatamaan a wawaan, pur~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn nida ku sakatur~…ĺu nu tatamaan a wawa ¶i j…ôn- ¶un, sakas…ôpat a wawa ¶i j…ôn-siw par~…ĺańßida ńßan u ńßu ¶u nu tad…ômaw. ¶i w…ôn-di nai Ē~ ° ku tan…ôkt…ôkaj a a…ôn…ôŇčan, par~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn nida ku babar~…ĺaki patid…ôŇč tu wawa, ¶i j…ôn-kun par~…ĺawp…ôsan nida ¶i j…ôn-juŇč, sa patid…ôŇč tu tan- ¶aw a tan-kaw- ¶u r~…ĺi-j…ôn mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶, sisa ¶i suj-tan-s…ô- ¶…ô saan u suj- ¶a nika ńßinian ku nikad…ôm…ô ¶. . w…ôn-di bar~…ĺakitu ku nikaudaip ńßina par~…ĺawp…ôs, manamuńß tu kanamuńßan, sad…ômiad sa midaŇč, ina r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a wajwajan mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid ¶i taj ¶…ô j…ôŇč-kun, ju mikuwan ńß…ônaj ¶i w…ôn-ti mamin mapar~…ĺawp…ôs ku ni ¶uwkiŇčan, mamin mapar~…ĺawp…ôs ni j…ôŇč-kun. .
